title: B1 Listening Part 1 - Test 26
instructions: For each question, listen to the short recording and choose the correct picture: A, B or C.

questions.context: You hear a teacher giving information about the school meeting.
questions.audio_script: Woman: Before you go, remember that the school meeting is not in its usual place today. Some students thought it was in the canteen, but lunch is being served there. Others may wait near the library, although a parent event is there. [1]Please go straight to the gym at break time[/1]. If your friend is absent this morning, send them a quick message so they do not arrive late. The teacher will start as soon as everyone is there. || Woman: Let's check the plan once more before we leave, just to be sure.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Before you go, remember that the school meeting is not in its usual place today. Some students thought it was in the canteen, but lunch is being served there. Others may wait near the library, although a parent event is there. Please go straight to the gym at break time. If your friend is absent this morning, send them a quick message so they do not arrive late. The teacher will start as soon as everyone is there.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Let's check the plan once more before we leave, just to be sure.

questions.question: Where will the school meeting be?

A.imagePrompt: Simple Cambridge exam illustration style, students gathered in a canteen, no text or labels, flat educational drawing, black and white line art, minimal details, clean white background.

B.imagePrompt: Simple Cambridge exam illustration style, students gathered in a gym, no text or labels, flat educational drawing, black and white line art, minimal details, clean white background.

C.imagePrompt: Simple Cambridge exam illustration style, students around library shelves, no text or labels, flat educational drawing, black and white line art, minimal details, clean white background.

questions.explanation: The teacher says to go straight to the gym.

questions.context: You hear an announcement for passengers travelling to Leeds.
questions.audio_script: Speaker: Good afternoon. This is a message for passengers travelling to Leeds. You may have seen the earlier notice asking you to wait near the coach bay three, but that information has changed. [1]Please go to the coach bay six now[/1]. Do not use the covered walkway, because another coach is parked in bay three. Staff will be nearby if you need help with luggage or directions. Please move carefully and keep your tickets ready for checking. Thank you for your patience today.

dialogue.speaker: speaker
dialogue.text: Good afternoon. This is a message for passengers travelling to Leeds. You may have seen the earlier notice asking you to wait near the coach bay three, but that information has changed. Please go to the coach bay six now. Do not use the covered walkway, because another coach is parked in bay three. Staff will be nearby if you need help with luggage or directions. Please move carefully and keep your tickets ready for checking. Thank you for your patience today.

questions.question: Where should passengers go now?

A.imagePrompt: Simple Cambridge exam illustration style, people walking under a covered walkway, no text or labels, flat educational drawing, black and white line art, minimal details, clean white background.

B.imagePrompt: Simple Cambridge exam illustration style, people boarding a coach at a coach bay, no text or labels, flat educational drawing, black and white line art, minimal details, clean white background.

C.imagePrompt: Simple Cambridge exam illustration style, people waiting near a coffee stand, no text or labels, flat educational drawing, black and white line art, minimal details, clean white background.

questions.explanation: The announcement says passengers should go to the coach bay six now.

questions.context: You hear two people talking about a broken lamp.
questions.audio_script: Boy: Did anyone fix your lamp? || Girl: Yes, but it wasn’t the problem I expected. I thought it was the switch, because it looked odd yesterday. || Boy: Was it the plug then? || Girl: I wondered that too, because the switch felt stiff. Then someone checked it carefully and [1]the lamp came on after Mum changed the bulb[/1]. || Boy: So it was quite simple. || Girl: Yes, luckily. I need it tonight, so I’m glad it is working again. || Girl: Let's check the plan once more before we leave, just to be sure.

dialogue.speaker: boy
dialogue.text: Did anyone fix your lamp?

dialogue.speaker: girl
dialogue.text: Yes, but it wasn’t the problem I expected. I thought it was the switch, because it looked odd yesterday.

dialogue.speaker: boy
dialogue.text: Was it the plug then?

dialogue.speaker: girl
dialogue.text: I wondered that too, because the switch felt stiff. Then someone checked it carefully and the lamp came on after Mum changed the bulb.

dialogue.speaker: boy
dialogue.text: So it was quite simple.

dialogue.speaker: girl
dialogue.text: Yes, luckily. I need it tonight, so I’m glad it is working again.

dialogue.speaker: girl
dialogue.text: Let's check the plan once more before we leave, just to be sure.

questions.question: What was the problem with the lamp?

questions.explanation: The speaker says the lamp came on after Mum changed the bulb, so option B is correct.

questions.context: You hear two people choosing food at a picnic shop.
questions.audio_script: Man: Have you chosen what to eat at the picnic shop? The queue is moving quickly. || Woman: I nearly chose the crisps, but crisps make me thirsty. || Man: What about the biscuits? It looks popular today. || Woman: I thought about it, but biscuits are for dessert. [1]I’m going to have the cheese rolls[/1]. It should be enough before our journey. || Man: Good choice. I’ll order mine after you, and then we can find a table near the window. || Man: Let's check the plan once more before we leave, just to be sure.

dialogue.text: Have you chosen what to eat at the picnic shop? The queue is moving quickly.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: I nearly chose the crisps, but crisps make me thirsty.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: What about the biscuits? It looks popular today.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: I thought about it, but biscuits are for dessert. I’m going to have the cheese rolls. It should be enough before our journey.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Good choice. I’ll order mine after you, and then we can find a table near the window.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Let's check the plan once more before we leave, just to be sure.

questions.context: You hear two friends making plans after school.
questions.audio_script: Woman: Are we still going to the concert after school? || Man: I don't think so. The band has cancelled. || Woman: We could try the park café instead. || Man: Maybe, but it shuts at five. My uncle has two tickets, so [1]we're going to a comedy show this afternoon instead[/1]. || Woman: That sounds fine. Shall we meet outside the bus station? || Man: Yes, at four. Bring your student card, because they sometimes ask for it at the desk. || Man: Let's check the plan once more before we leave, just to be sure.

questions.context: You hear two people talking about a present for my best friend.
questions.audio_script: Woman: I still need a present for my best friend. I thought about buying a diary, but that didn't seem special. || Man: What about a scarf? You mentioned that last week. || Woman: I checked, but the shop only had expensive ones. In the end, [1]I bought a water bottle because she takes one to dance class[/1]. || Man: That sounds perfect. Useful presents are often better than decorations. || Woman: I hope so. I’ll wrap it tonight after dinner, and take it over tomorrow. || Woman: Let's check the plan once more before we leave, just to be sure.

questions.context: You hear two people talking about travelling to the shopping centre.
questions.audio_script: Man: How are you getting to the shopping centre on Saturday? || Woman: I was going to take the train, but the train is delayed. || Man: What about walking? || Woman: True, but it might rain. My sister offered a lift, but [1]I’m going to take the bus because it leaves from outside our school[/1]. || Man: Good idea. I’ll meet you by the main entrance at ten, so we can go in together. Don’t forget your ticket. || Man: Let's check the plan once more before we leave, just to be sure.
